string 2: This is as far as you go, Parallelmon, ravager of time and space.
They vanished!
What is Parallelmon trying to pull?
Over there! Parallelmon!

Here we spent all this time running away from Parallelmon,
and now they're the one fleeing from us!
It looks like it's waiting for us to tire out.
I think they are waiting for us to expend all our energy.

They're probably trying to stay out of reach in the hope that
we tire out eventually. Where's its sense of pride?
Is it waiting for us to exhaust ourselves?

It looks like it's just runnin' around,
hoping we wear ourselves out chasin' it.

It is clearly trying to turn this into a test of endurance.
We must come up with some kind of plan in response.

If we could just block off its path somehow, 
we might be able to corner it.
Yes... and I believe I know how we can accomplish that feat...
...but it depends on you.
M-Me?!

Though it was only for a short time, you managed to seize
control of the mechanism governing this white world.

I doubt you intended it, but you have gained some influence
over this world. It should respond to your fervent wish.

You need only keep your wish, the wish that your voice
might be heard, at the forefront of your mind and your heart.

Now, come. Let us return to the places where you
found those black crystals that govern this world.

You may be able to make this world respond to your will. 
Go on. Try making your wish.
Hnh...!
"Inori... just look at what's become of the world..."
"Everyone's... just given up..."
"I can feel it, too. It's like my heart is breaking..."
"But... I keep on filming."

"I'm not even sure why.
Somehow... I just can't stop myself."
"I think it's because..."​
"...you've always been such a good friend to me, Inori..."
"...even though it was all my fault..."​

Yes, very good. 
This world is responding to your sincere wish.
Hey, not bad. Now, on to the next one!

This is quite promising. 
Now, let us move on to the next one.
Well done. Now, let's move on.
Okay, next!
We better move on to the next one quick!

Now, make your wish. 
This world may respond to the voice of your heart.
...Ngh!
"Let me help with what public safety's doing!"

"I can record footage of Digimon and anomalous
phenomena to provide you with information."

"I'll admit, with all that's going on right now, we do need help.
But I'm not about to put a civilian's life at risk."

"My being a civilian isn't going to matter if the world
comes to an end! I just don't wanna give up, not yet..."
"...not when it was all my fault."
"When Yuu and his mom... went to the movie theater..."

"...to see the new Agent Alpha movie...
I was the one who gave them the tickets."

"Yuu and his mom never came home that day.
They got caught up in the anomalous phenomenon..."

In spite of all that... Inori always stayed by my side
as a true friend. That's why...!
I see... So it is grief and determination that fill your soul...
Huh?

And it is that voice of your heart that the crystals are
responding to. We must keep this up.
Now, exert your influence over that crystal.
Hnh...!
"...Parallelmon?"

"They're a hostile Digimon we haven't been
able to get much of a handle on so far."

"Dr. Simmons has a theory that they can
travel freely through space-time."
"Is that... really possible?"
"...But never mind. I'm on it!"

"Not this time, you aren't. Parallelmon isn't like any other
Digimon you've dealt with so far! Let this one go."

"No, I'm gonna do this. I don't care what it takes. 
I'm getting Parallelmon on camera. Just you wait and see!"

I see... So although you may not have any special power
yourself, you possess a unique resolve to take action...

That requires a level of determination
 far beyond that of the powerful.

Perhaps it was more than a mere fluke that you
managed to resist the control of this mechanism.

Well... I don't know about any of that.
I was just desperate.

And that is good enough. Come. Let us move on.
Soon we will have control of all of the crystals.
Now, let your most fervent wish flow into that crystal.
Hnh...!

"Oh, I was so close... So close to
getting Parallelmon on camera that time!"
"I thought I warned you to stay away from that thing."
"Why are you so obsessed with Parallelmon, anyway?"
"It can travel freely through space-time, right?"
"If you could analyze its data for me, then maybe..."
"...maybe we could get my voice to reach my friends..."

"I'd be like an interdimensional messenger,
communicating across time and space... right?"

You wish to send your voice across time and space...
So, the source of your determination is concern for your friends...
You make it sound a lot more complicated than it actually is...

It's just that, when I think of them—Inori and the others,
I can't help but want to DO something.

I do not know if this is mere coincidence or fate, but
concern for one who is close to me fills my soul as well.

We must return to our original worlds at all costs.
Now, let us move on. Your wish will make this world whole.

I am sensing something... 
Parallelmon is no longer moving around as they were before.

We should return to where the others are resting
and prepare ourselves for battle.

Your voice, your wish... Though I may not be
who it was intended for, I heard it all the same.

If I can bring back info on Parallelmon,
my dream just might come true.

To be a messenger across time and space... 
and for my voice to reach Inori and the others.
And for that... I need to get back to my world.
Hmm... Perhaps it was no mere coincidence that we met here.
I, too, seek to return to my world for the sake of a friend.

Regrettably, that companion of mine was corrupted when
Parallelmon stole away something very dear to him.

Now I must put a stop to my friend... In honor of our friendship,
it must be my hand that deals the final blow.

My resolve, my grief... 
that is what drives me.

"For our friends..."
That's something we can get behind, too.

We all have things important to us that we need to protect.
So let's fight together and go home.

Together, I know we can do it. 
After all, we are brothers—sworn fist to fist!
The time has come...
YAAAAAAAAAAAGH!
Hah!
Yaaaaaaah!
Hnh...!
Hnh...!
Hnh...!
Hnh...!
Hnh...!
Your... Your form...!
Whoa...

My companions! Thank you for standing behind me.
Your words have reassured me...

...that my resolve was not mistaken. 
It is only right that we give our all for our friends.

The ravager of time and space will soon meet their end. 
Come, now. Let us do battle with Parallelmon!
Yeah!
Guh...!
Hnh...!
Yeah...!
Hnh...!
